CVE-2023-36661.title: Shibboleth XMLTooling before 3.2.4, as used in OpenSAML and Shibb ...
CVE-2023-36661.summary: Shibboleth XMLTooling before 3.2.4, as used in OpenSAML and Shibboleth Service Provider, allows SSRF via a crafted KeyInfo element. (This is fixed in, for example, Shibboleth Service Provider 3.4.1.3 on Windows.)
